narrative:
Diney is a crucial Centre-Back for Portugal in this World Cup campaign. His overall rating of 7.51/10 places him firmly in the top 1% of centre-backs at the tournament. This elite rating is a blend of his strong club form over the last two seasons and his contributions in the current competition.

His performance evidence from this World Cup highlights significant defensive strengths. Diney averages an impressive 10.333 clearances per 90 minutes, alongside 2.667 tackles and 1.0 interceptions per 90 minutes.
